title: Aura
wikitext:
[[File:Gon-gon-nen.gif|thumb|center|700px|[[Gon Freecss|Gon]] confronts [[Neferpitou]]]]


==Summary==
'''The ability to have energy envelop the user'''. It can be used (consciously or subconsciously) for various purposes (such as intimidation). This covers supernatural abilities only, natural effects fall under [[Social Influencing]].

==Possible Uses==
*'''Explosive''' – When activated, this type of aura creates a powerful shock wave of energy around the user. Also includes various [[Elemental Manipulation|elemental]] aura.
*'''Overwhelming''' – An aura which causes a variety of negative effects on the enemy. Effects range from weakness to unconsciousness to death (i.e., can kill by aura alone).
*'''Fear-inducing''' – Aura affecting an enemy's emotions, making them feel insecurity and fear. Generally has a negative impact on the target's fighting ability, and at high levels (in the absence of resilience), can cause hallucinations  and induce insanity.
*'''Rage-inducing''' – Aura which forces the opponent to lose control of themself. Might function by simply reinforcing negative emotions such as anger, bloodlust, etc. and induces rage and complete loss of emotional control.
*'''Materialized''' – Aura that can transform into material objects (usually temporarily). It can be used to create weapons, armour, and in some cases, even living creatures.
*'''Catastrophe-inducing''' – Aura that causes natural (or supernatural) disasters on a humongous scale. Might even allow the user [[Absorption|to absorb]] from surroundings at an unlimited scale.
*'''Charismatic''' – Aura that causes a supernatural charm for its user. Allows various purposes, such as causing the target to fall in love with the user.

==Users==
*[[Natsu Dragneel (X784 to X791)|Natsu Dragneel]] ([[Fairy Tail]]) (Explosive – Fire Elemental)
*[[Dragon Ball]] characters (Explosive)
*[[Adepta Sororitas#Living Saint|Living Saints]] ([[Warhammer 40,000]]) (Charismatic; Overwhelming)
*[[Heatwave (DC Comics)|Heatwave]] ([[DC Comics]]) (Explosive - Heat)
